items.title: Long Easy Run
items.description: Run 10 km at an easy pace of 6:45-7:15 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-150 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: 8 minutes warm-up, followed by 5x800m intervals at 5:20 min/km pace with 3 minutes recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Strength Training Session
items.description: Focus on lower body and core. Perform 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, lunges, and deadlifts, with 1 minute rest between sets.

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 6 km at a tempo pace of 5:50-6:00 min/km. Start with a 10-minute warm-up and finish with a 10-minute cool down. Aim for a heart rate in Zone 3 (150-165 bpm).
